name: Kerang
notes: /The Powercor Distribution Annual Planning Report outlines some potential opportunities and considerations for implementing a Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) in the Kerang region. Specifically, the KGTS-SHL 66 kV sub-transmission loop, which supplies the Gannawarra Solar Farm (GSF) and Swan Hill zone substation from the Kerang terminal station, has identified system constraints due to load at risk and voltage limitations【4:2†DAPR_2023_Powercor_Distribution Annual Planning Report.pdf】.

name: Rothbury
notes: Ausgrid’s proposed BESS will be located at 1309 Wine Country Drive, Rothbury. If approved, the project will be built and operated by a third party. This battery will store 540MWh of energy - that's enough to power up to 36,450 Ausgrid households a day.
